_doc: Inventory catalog. Each entry: { name, icon, blurb, from_card }. Icon path is res://; render at 32x32 in the bar.

fool_bindle.name: John's bindle
fool_bindle.blurb: A knotted handkerchief on a stick. Light enough for a Fool starting a journey; heavy with anachronism.

magician_iron.name: Frasier's soldering iron
magician_iron.blurb: Cathedral-grade, still warm. The tip has traced the same infinity glyph too many times to draw anything else.
